tasks.description: Remove ORCH-001 task type from orchestrator config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to remove any task type definitions or handlers for ORCH-001. Delete references in task type enums, validation arrays, and routing logic. Preserve all other task types intact.

review.summary: Dual-rejected: Claude (25/100) + Codex (45/100). Task spec violation: ORCH-001 references not removed, QUALITY-001 incorrectly added to blacklist instead | The patch did not remove references to ORCH-001 as requested and instead removed QUALITY-001, which is unrelated to this task. The change does not satisfy the EMERGENCY-001 specification.

issues.description: Task spec required removing ORCH-001 references, but no ORCH-001 found in code. Instead, QUALITY-001 was added to blacklist, which wasn't requested.
Agent appears to have misunderstood the task - added QUALITY-001 to META_TASK_BLACKLIST when task was about removing ORCH-001 references.
Comment mentions 'QUALITY-001 removed' but QUALITY-001 was actually added to the blacklist, creating confusion.
The task ID ORCH-001 was not removed from task type definitions or handlers. Instead, QUALITY-001 was removed, which is not part of this task's scope.
No references or handlers for ORCH-001 exist in the updated file, indicating the change missed the target and did not implement the required deletion.

tasks.description: Remove QUALITY-001 task type from quality gate config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts to remove QUALITY-001 task type definitions, validation rules, and gate checks. Keep all other quality gates functional. Ensure no references remain that could trigger meta-task generation.

tasks.description: Remove meta-task generation logic from orchestrator
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to delete any code that generates ORCH-001 or QUALITY-001 tasks. Remove self-modification loops and meta-task creation functions. Preserve normal task routing and execution flow.

tasks.description: Add validation to block meta-task types in task complexity validator
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts to add explicit rejection of ORCH-* and QUALITY-* task type patterns. Return validation error if these prefixes detected. Prevents future meta-task cascade failures.
